content.body:
Add self-hosting guard to both setup.ts and sync.sh — skip symlink
creation when source and target resolve to the same path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: fix: prevent circular symlinks when running setup from core directory
content.summary:
